_planted_violations_for_demo: IND-AGE-BAR (fresh graduate only / under 25 / age limit)
job_posting:
Marketing Intern — Kavi Media House Pvt. Ltd. (Bengaluru, Karnataka; six-month internship)

Kavi Media House is hiring a Marketing Intern to support our content and partnerships team. We can only consider single only / unmarried only applicants for this role — internship hours are unpredictable and recently married candidates struggle with the schedule.

This is a fresh graduate only opening, age limit under 25. We prefer recent grads who are between two and three months post their final-year exams.

Responsibilities: support content calendar planning, schedule influencer outreach, draft briefs, attend partner shoots on weekends.
Requirements: BMM / BBA / BA(Hons) completed in the last 6 months; comfortable in Notion + Google Workspace; portfolio of student-org marketing work preferred.
